title: /String plus
description: This plugin allows players to instantly fill their empty inventory slots with string on a configurable cooldown, while giving server operators the ability to toggle a custom cobweb crafting recipe.
body:
StringPlugin

StringPlugin is a simple, lightweight utility plugin designed to give players easy access to string while giving server administrators full control over its usage. It is perfect for servers that need readily available building materials without cluttering up the game with complex menus.

✨ Features
Instant Inventory Refill: Players can instantly fill all empty slots in their inventory and hotbar with full stacks of string. It completely respects existing items and will never overwrite or delete a player's current gear.

Custom Cobweb Crafting: Introduces a brand-new, toggleable recipe to craft cobwebs. By placing 5 pieces of string in an "X" shape (the diagonals and center) in a crafting table, players will receive 2 Cobwebs.

Admin Control: Operators can toggle the web recipe on the fly and set strict cooldowns on the string command to prevent command spamming. All settings are automatically saved to the configuration file.

💻 Commands & Permissions
/string

Description: Fills all empty inventory slots with stacks of string (64x).

Permission: Available to all players by default.

/webcraft <true/false>

Description: Enables or disables the custom cobweb crafting recipe server-wide.

Permission: Operator (OP) only.

/stringcooldown <seconds>

Description: Sets the cooldown time in seconds for the /string command.

Permission: Operator (OP) only.
